name: Sai Dev Anirudh Thatode
title: Voice AI Lead
summary: Voice AI Lead building production grade voicebots, RAG systems, and multi-agent platforms across airports, BFSI, and marketing use cases.
highlights: Led a 6-member Voice AI team with 95 percent on-time delivery
Reduced average response time by 3.8 seconds and improved call containment by 30 percent
Engineered high-concurrency ARI flows sustaining 8 calls per second under peak traffic
Built GraphRAG and Agentic RAG pipelines improving first-query resolution by 25 percent
